title: Material entity (ONT-E-19, D-01)
description: An aerospace material (alloy / composite / polymer / ceramic / coating). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 lock; NEVER additionalProperties: false). Per ADR-002, design_allowables_reference is free-text in v0.1.0; structured `cites` relation lands in v0.2.0+ (RESEARCH.md Open Question #1). nominal_composition is also free-text in v0.1.0; structured composition lists deferred to v0.2.0. Examples: Ti-6Al-4V (titanium alloy), AS4/3501-6 (carbon-fiber/epoxy composite), Inconel 718 (nickel superalloy). Schema version: 0.1.0.

name.description: Common identifier for the material. Examples: 'Ti-6Al-4V', 'AS4/3501-6', 'Inconel 718'.

family.description: Top-level material family. metal_alloy = wrought/cast metallic alloys. composite = fiber-reinforced polymer/metal/ceramic matrix. polymer = neat polymers (unfilled). ceramic = monolithic ceramics (CMC goes under composite). coating = surface treatments (anodize, chromate, thermal-spray).

nominal_composition.description: Free-text nominal composition in v0.1.0 (per ADR-002 / RESEARCH.md Open Question #1). Examples: '90% Ti, 6% Al, 4% V', 'Carbon fiber AS4 in epoxy 3501-6 matrix, [0/45/90/-45]_2s layup'. Structured composition lists deferred to v0.2.0+.

design_allowables_reference.description: Free-text reference to design allowables source in v0.1.0 (per ADR-002 / RESEARCH.md Open Question #1). Examples: 'MIL-HDBK-5J Table 5.4.1.0(a)', 'MMPDS-2024 Section 5.4', 'CMH-17 Volume 2 Chapter 4'. v0.2.0+ may upgrade to a `cites` relation pointing at a Standard entity.

heat_treatment_or_layup.description: Heat treatment condition (metals) or layup specification (composites). Examples: 'Mill annealed', 'Solution treated and aged (STA)', '[0/45/90/-45]_2s symmetric layup'.

typical_applications.description: Free-form list of typical aerospace applications. Examples: ['airframe primary structure', 'engine fan blades', 'landing gear forgings'].
